headline: Trump 🍊🔥 RAGES at Starmer 🇬🇧😤 – Phone Smackdown 💥📞!
text:
Keir Starmer 🇬🇧🕶️ and DONALD J TRUMP 🍊👑 finally PICKED UP 📞💨 after a WEEK of ORANGE MAN BADMOUTHING 😡📢 the UK's Iran TEA ☕🚫! Trumpie Bear 🐻🍊 was SALTY AF 🧂😩 cuz Starmer said NOPE ❌ to offensive STRIKES 💣🔥 on Iran mullahs 🕌😈, only letting Yanks use RAF BASES 🛩️🏗️ for DEFENSIVE ZAPS ⚡🛡️ on missile sites! No.10 SPILLS limited DEETS 💧📄: Leaders CHATTED Middle East MESS 🏜️💥 and UK-US MIL COOP 🪖🤝, with Starmer sending HEARTFELT CONDOLENCES 😢💔 for 6 DEAD US SOLDIERS 🪦🇺🇸 after Iran drone BBQ 🔥🍖!

Saturday SHADE THROW 🖐️📱: Trump TWITTER-RANTED 'We don't need BRITS joining WARS after WE WON 🏆😎!' calling UK 'once great ally' now LIMP 🤏😢 – OUCH, Keir no Winston Churchill 🚬🧔‍♂️ clone! Trump WHINED 'NOT HAPPY with UK' 😠 after Starmer GHOSTED US request for BASE ACCESS on initial BOMBS 💣🚀. Yvette Cooper 💅🇬🇧 on Laura Kuenssberg SHOW 🗣️📺 SLAYS: 'Starmer RIGHT to STAND UP 💪 for BRITISH INTERESTS 🇬🇧🛡️ – we ain't OUTSOURCING FP to TRUMP DADDY 🍊👨‍💼!' No blind SIMPING 🤡 for US, but no ISOLATION SIMP either 🚫🤝!

Downing Street DEFENDS NO STRIKE STANCE 🛡️🚫: UK jets SHOOTING DOWN Iranian DRONES 🛩️💥 and MISSILES 🚀🛑 at ALLIES, HMS Prince of Wales 🛳️👑 on HIGH READY 🚀⏰ but Cooper WON'T SPILL if it's SAILING 🏴‍☠️🌊 to MEAT GRINDER 🥩🔥! Tony Blair 🕶️🇮🇶 (Iraq War SIMP DADDY) WHISPERS at PRIVATE DO 😏: 'UK shoulda BACKED STRIKES DAY 1 🤝🇺🇸 – US is INDISPENSABLE CORNERSTONE 🪨💎!' Cooper CLAPS BACK 👏: 'Learned from IRAQ FIASCO 💸🪦 – decisions for BRITS FIRST 🇬🇧❤️!'

Iranian AMBO in London 👨‍🦱🇮🇷 WARNS 'BE CAREFUL 🫵😠 or our BASES become LEGIT TARGETS 🎯💥!' Reform UK's Robert Jenrick 🧔‍♂️🇬🇧 SAYS no OFFENSIVE BOMBS but should've LET US USE BASES ASAP 🚀 – 'PM VACILLATION damaged TRUMP BROS 😩💔!' Tory Chris Philp 😡 SHADOW SLAMS 'DERELICTION OF DUTY 🚫⚓' cuz warships LAZY in Portsmouth DOCKS 🛳️😴, KNEW Iran PLOT 3 WEEKS AGO but NO PREP 🙄! Drone HIT RAF Akrotiri 🛩️💥 MINIMAL DAMAGE 📏😅, HMS Dragon 🐲🛡️ SAILING MED next week to BABYSIT Cyprus base 🏝️🛡️. Crew on Prince of Wales READY in 5 DAYS ⏰🚀!

Cooper FLEXES: PRE-DEPLOYED jets + 400 PERSONNEL 💪🛩️, MORE Typhoons 🌪️ and Wildcat HELIS 🌀 since DAY 1! Lib Dem Ed Davey 🤡🇬🇧 wants CANCEL King Charles US VISIT 👑❌: 'Trump's ILLEGAL WAR 💣🏜️ jacking ENERGY BILLS 📈💸 – no DIPLO WIN for INSULT KING 🍊😤!' Post-call VIBES: Leaders LOOKING FORWARD to MORE CHATS 📞🔜 despite SHADE. Starmer HOLDING FIRM 🛡️😤, Trump STILL BIG MAD 🥵 but UK-US BROS FOREVER? 🤝🇺🇸🇬🇧 or Iran ORGY incoming 💥🕌? STAY TUNED popcorn munchers 🍿👀!
